stories.title: NBA playoff takeaways: Cavaliers close out Pistons...
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned from the conference semifinals.

stories.title: Mitchell, Cavs break through, rout Pistons in G7
stories.summary: The Cavaliers throttled the top-seeded Pistons in Game 7 to advance to the franchise's first Eastern Conference finals since LeBron James' final year in Cleveland.

stories.title: Rai rises to the top, eclipses stars for PGA title...
stories.summary: Aaron Rai shot a 5-under 65 to pull away from some of the game's biggest stars, becoming the first English-born golfer to win the PGA Championship since 1919.

stories.title: Pistons bounced, but year 'not a disappointment'
stories.summary: Though he watched his Pistons suffer a 125-94 loss to the Cleveland Cavaliers in Game 7 Sunday night at Little Caesars Arena, Detroit coach J.B. Bickerstaff told reporters afterward that the season, overall, was "not a disappointment."

stories.title: 14-4 under Mattingly, Phils surge over .500 mark
stories.summary: The resurgent Phillies improved to 15-4 since interim manager Don Mattingly took over, and they also shot over the .500 mark, at 24-23, for the first time since April 7 as Philadelphia beat the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-0, completing a three-game sweep Sunday.
